title: ✔ Independent Inquiry Block
content:
✔ Independent Inquiry Block
✔ Catharsis Threads (Night/Day Framework, With Sub-Thematic Naming)
✔ Final Project & Student Pathways (Incl. Alternative Research/Creative/Peer Review-Based Tracks)
✔ Extra Credit Assignments (Creative Writing + Weekly Recommendations + Mastery Exam Pathways)
✔ Game/RPG System for Student Avatars & Points-Based Development
✔ Two Weekly Extra Credit Options (Creative + Recommendations Thread)
✔ Weeks 11-12 Art/Lit Movements (Correct Historical Placement)
✔ Sign & Signifier Lecture – Where to Place It?
✔ Voting Mechanism for Student-Selected Films (Weeks 11 & 12)
✔ Mastery Exam System (Fallen Angel Path, Symbolism of Three, Unlocking Exemptions, etc.)
✔ Penalty/Incentive for Peer Review Participation (Cannot Complete Final Without It)
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 107 (chunk 107/108)
